_publications._publicationTitle: A multicenter study of neurofibromatosis type 1 utilizing deep learning for whole body tumor identification.

_contextSnippet: The box loss values of the training set decreased from 6.27% to 2.79%, while they decreased from 4.30% to 2.47% in the validation process
details: Box loss values decreased from 6.27% to 2.79% in training set and from 4.30% to 2.47% in validation process
